title: Send Help
review: Like all Sam Raimi horror movies, it's really fun and full of gross silliness. The plot was a bit predictable but I found myself eager to see how Rachel McAdams' performance would unfold. She was really good in it, and outshone that other guy who was totally forgettable. It's not much of a horror movie but I think it counts enough to review here. I laughed out loud at one grotesque moment.
